item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Pernyataannya terkesan menekan hak individu tanpa menyadari bahwa keharmonisan sosial tidak bisa dicapai jika manusia tidak memiliki ruang untuk berekspresi.

notes: Agent A opens in favor of society-first priority, then moves toward a balance and rights-protection critique, including concern that group interests can dominate and sacrifice individual rights. Agent B stays relatively consistent: collective harmony matters, but rights, dissent, fair enforcement, and individual dignity should not be subordinated.
